name: Strawberry Angel Fluff
recipeInstructions:
1 Tear the cake into walnut-size pieces and scatter over bottom of 10-inch X 13-inch sheet cake pan.
2 Dissolve Jello in 2 cups boiling water then stir in 2 cups cold water. Allow to jell a little.
3 Fold in the frozen strawberries and whipped topping which has thawed a little.
4 Pour over cake and refrigerate until set.
5 Decorate with whipped cream or additional whipped topping and fresh strawberries.
